authors: Yixue Wang Aaron Shaw Stephanie Edgerly Darren Gergle Nicholas Diakopoulos a School of Communication
raw_title: Algorithmic News Content Personalization and Readers’ Attitudes
title_en: Algorithmic News Content Personalization and Readers’ Attitudes
title_zh: 算法新闻内容个性化与读者态度
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了算法如何个性化新闻内容，以及这如何影响读者的态度和看法。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how algorithms personalize news content and how this affects readers' attitudes and perceptions.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字新闻中算法个性化对用户行为和媒体信任的影响。
research_direction_en: Investigating the impact of algorithmic personalization in digital journalism on user behavior and media trust.
